name: Chocolate-Filled Ravioli Cookie
recipeIngredient: if using self-rising flour, omit baking soda and salt.
recipeInstructions:
Mix sugar, shortening, margarine, eggs, and vanilla. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt. Divide dough into 4 equal parts. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
Place chocolate chips and walnuts in blender or food processor. Cover and blend or process until mixture begins to hold together.
Heat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Roll one part of dough into rectangle, 12 X 8 inches, on lightly floured surface. Cut dough into 12 rectangles, each 3 X 2 inches. Place 1 teaspoon packed chocolate mixture on one end of each rectangle. Carefully fold dough over filling using a metal spatula or knife dipped in flour. Pinch edges to seal. Press edges with fork dipped in flour. Place cookies on ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until cookies are light brown. Brush warm cookies with honey. Sprinkle with finely chopped nuts. Remove to rack to cool. Repeat with remaining dough.
Makes 4 dozen cookies; 100 calories per cookie.
